Package org.apache.arrow.datafusion.common

Record Class ScalarValue.FixedSizeListValue

java.lang.Object
java.lang.Record
org.apache.arrow.datafusion.common.ScalarValue.FixedSizeListValue
All Implemented Interfaces:
ScalarValue, ScalarValue.ListScalarValue
Enclosing interface:
ScalarValue
public static record ScalarValue.FixedSizeListValue(List<ScalarValue> values, int listSize) extends Record implements ScalarValue.ListScalarValue
A fixed-size list scalar value where every list has the same number of elements.

  • Nested Class Summary

    Nested classes/interfaces inherited from interface org.apache.arrow.datafusion.common.ScalarValue

    ScalarValue.Binary, ScalarValue.BinaryValue, ScalarValue.BinaryView, ScalarValue.BooleanValue, ScalarValue.Date32, ScalarValue.Date64, ScalarValue.DateValue, ScalarValue.Decimal128, ScalarValue.Decimal256, ScalarValue.Decimal32, ScalarValue.Decimal64, ScalarValue.DecimalValue, ScalarValue.DictionaryValue, ScalarValue.DurationMicrosecond, ScalarValue.DurationMillisecond, ScalarValue.DurationNanosecond, ScalarValue.DurationSecond, ScalarValue.DurationValue, ScalarValue.FixedSizeBinary, ScalarValue.FixedSizeListValue, ScalarValue.Float16, ScalarValue.Float32, ScalarValue.Float64, ScalarValue.FloatValue, ScalarValue.Int16, ScalarValue.Int32, ScalarValue.Int64, ScalarValue.Int8, ScalarValue.IntegerValue, ScalarValue.IntervalDayTime, ScalarValue.IntervalMonthDayNano, ScalarValue.IntervalYearMonth, ScalarValue.LargeBinary, ScalarValue.LargeListValue, ScalarValue.LargeUtf8, ScalarValue.ListScalarValue, ScalarValue.ListValue, ScalarValue.MapScalarValue, ScalarValue.MapValue, ScalarValue.Null, ScalarValue.RunEndEncodedValue, ScalarValue.StringValue, ScalarValue.StructValue, ScalarValue.Time32Millisecond, ScalarValue.Time32Second, ScalarValue.Time64Microsecond, ScalarValue.Time64Nanosecond, ScalarValue.TimestampMicrosecond, ScalarValue.TimestampMillisecond, ScalarValue.TimestampNanosecond, ScalarValue.TimestampSecond, ScalarValue.TimestampValue, ScalarValue.TimeValue, ScalarValue.UInt16, ScalarValue.UInt32, ScalarValue.UInt64, ScalarValue.UInt8, ScalarValue.UnionValue, ScalarValue.Utf8, ScalarValue.Utf8View

      public FixedSizeListValue(List<ScalarValue> values, int listSize)

  • Method Details

    • toList

      public List<Object> toList()
      Description copied from interface: ScalarValue.ListScalarValue
      Returns the list elements with each value converted via ScalarValue.getObject().
      Specified by:
      toList in interface ScalarValue.ListScalarValue

    • getObject

      public Object getObject()
      Description copied from interface: ScalarValue
      Returns this scalar value as its natural Java type.

      The mapping follows Arrow Java conventions where consistent, and improves where Arrow returns raw primitives. For example, Date32 returns LocalDate rather than Integer.

      Specified by:
      getObject in interface ScalarValue
      Returns:
      the value as a standard Java type, or null for ScalarValue.Null

    • toString

      public final String toString()
      Returns a string representation of this record class. The representation contains the name of the class, followed by the name and value of each of the record components.
      Specified by:
      toString in class Record
      Returns:
      a string representation of this object

    • hashCode

      public final int hashCode()
      Returns a hash code value for this object. The value is derived from the hash code of each of the record components.
      Specified by:
      hashCode in class Record
      Returns:
      a hash code value for this object

    • equals

      public final boolean equals(Object o)
      Indicates whether some other object is "equal to" this one. The objects are equal if the other object is of the same class and if all the record components are equal. Reference components are compared with Objects::equals(Object,Object); primitive components are compared with '=='.
      Specified by:
      equals in class Record
      Parameters:
      o - the object with which to compare
      Returns:
      true if this object is the same as the o argument; false otherwise.

      Returns:
